public_reputation: Known around Housechain Court through day-to-day work as faith-culture liaison.
manner: Treats custom as live infrastructure and corrects social missteps before they harden into offense. In Housechain Court, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of faith-culture liaison in and around Housechain Court, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Housechain Court workable through the obligations of faith-culture liaison while managing the immediate pressure of claim inflation, selective memory.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of faith-culture liaison credible while absorbing the strain created by claim inflation, selective memory.

adventure_hooks.summary: Alis Crestmark can draw the party into a locality problem centered on faith-culture liaison duties in Housechain Court.
Alis Crestmark becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with claim inflation, selective memory around Housechain Court.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Alis Crestmark is immediately readable as a faith-culture liaison tied to Housechain Court.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Housechain Court: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Alis Crestmark presents as someone shaped by the duties of a faith-culture liaison and the daily pressures of Housechain Court.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a faith-culture liaison, and proof that strangers will not make Housechain Court harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Alis Crestmark refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a faith-culture liaison too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can explain expected conduct and turn cultural knowledge into safe passage or trust.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Alis Crestmark adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Alis Crestmark always knows more about Housechain Court than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a faith-culture liaison in Housechain Court.
